Metadata.title: Family Dashboard
Metadata.description: The private dashboard for everyday family life.

Home.title: Home
Home.intro: A calm starting point for everything that will bring your family life together.
Home.emptyDescription: Family modules will appear here once they are set up. Until then, the dashboard stays intentionally uncluttered.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.intro: Adjust appearance, language, and account security.
Settings.appearanceDescription: Choose a light, dark, or system-based appearance.
Settings.languageDescription: The selection applies to the current view.

Auth.loginDescription: Sign in with your family account to open the private dashboard.
Auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we’ll send reset instructions if an account matches it.
Auth.resetRequestSent: If an account matches that address, a password reset email is on its way.
Auth.resetPasswordDescription: Use at least eight characters and keep this password private.
Auth.invalidFields: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
Auth.authenticationFailed: Sign-in failed. Check your credentials and try again.
Auth.requestFailed: The request could not be completed. Please try again.
Auth.invalidResetLink: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
Auth.passwordUpdateFailed: The password could not be updated. Request a new reset link and try again.
Auth.passwordUpdated: Your password was updated. You can now sign in.
Auth.passkeyInsecure: Passkeys require a secure HTTPS connection on this device.
Auth.passkeyUnsupported: This browser or device does not support passkeys.
Auth.passkeyDisabled: Passkeys are not available for this Supabase project.
Auth.passkeyExpired: The passkey request expired. Please try again.
Auth.passkeyVerificationFailed: The passkey could not be verified. Please try again.
Auth.passkeyNetworkFailed: The passkey service could not be reached. Check your connection and try again.
Auth.passkeyAuthenticationFailed: Passkey sign-in failed. Please try again or use your password.

Passkeys.securityDescription: Add and manage passkeys for your account. Password sign-in remains available.
Passkeys.title: Passkeys
Passkeys.managementHint: Use a device passkey, fingerprint, face recognition, PIN, or security key.
Passkeys.friendlyNameInvalid: Enter a name between 1 and {max} characters.
Passkeys.deleteDescription: “{name}” will be permanently removed. You will no longer be able to sign in with it.
Passkeys.emptyDescription: Add a passkey when you are ready. Your password will continue to work.
Passkeys.secureConnectionRequired: Passkeys require a secure HTTPS connection on this device.
Passkeys.unsupportedBrowser: This browser or device does not support passkeys.
Passkeys.passkeysDisabled: Passkeys are not available for this Supabase project.
Passkeys.credentialNotFound: That passkey is no longer available.
Passkeys.challengeExpired: The passkey request expired. Please try again.
Passkeys.verificationFailure: The passkey could not be verified. Please try again.
Passkeys.networkFailure: The passkey service could not be reached. Check your connection and try again.
Passkeys.tooManyPasskeys: This account has reached its passkey limit.
Passkeys.alreadyRegistered: This passkey is already registered to your account.
Passkeys.operationFailure: The passkey operation could not be completed. Please try again.

DisabledAccount.title: Account disabled
DisabledAccount.description: This application account is currently inactive.
DisabledAccount.help: Contact a family administrator if you believe this is a mistake. No administration details are shown here.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.intro: Manage how your account appears in the family dashboard.
Profile.avatarDescription: Upload a private picture shown to signed-in family members.
Profile.avatarHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF. Images are resized in your browser when possible; the stored file is limited to 2 MB.
Profile.removeDescription: Your current profile picture will be permanently removed.
Profile.displayNameInvalid: Enter a display name with no more than 100 characters.
Profile.languageHint: This preference is saved to your profile. Use the language selector to change the current view.
Profile.invalidFields: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
Profile.saveFailed: The profile could not be saved. Please try again.
Profile.avatarFailed: The profile picture could not be updated. Please try again.
Profile.invalidFileType: Choose a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.
Profile.fileTooLarge: The selected image is too large. Choose a smaller image.

AdminUsers.title: Users administration
AdminUsers.intro: Manage application roles and active access for family accounts.
AdminUsers.emailLimitation: Other users’ email addresses are omitted. Supabase Auth does not expose them safely through the publishable client, and this app intentionally has no Auth Admin secret.
AdminUsers.confirmRoleDescription: {name} will receive the {value} role. Database safeguards still prevent removal of the final active administrator.
AdminUsers.confirmStatusDescription: {name} will become {value}. Inactive accounts cannot use protected pages.
AdminUsers.notAuthorized: You are no longer authorized to make this change.
AdminUsers.targetNotFound: That application account no longer exists.
AdminUsers.cannotDeactivateSelf: You cannot deactivate your own account.
AdminUsers.lastActiveAdmin: The final active administrator cannot be demoted or deactivated.
AdminUsers.updateFailed: The account could not be updated. Please try again.
AdminUsers.emptyDescription: Profiles will appear after Auth users have been provisioned by the database migration.

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.description: The view could not be loaded. Please try again.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
